name: MitoQ vascular-aging trial is active without posted results
summary: Active-not-recruiting phase 2 MitoQ registry for age-related vascular dysfunction, with no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04851288 as active/not recruiting with 112 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults in an age-related vascular dysfunction trial
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 112; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
